title: Caregiver Registration, Verification, Consent & Feature Parity - Functional Test Plan
overview: Comprehensive functional testing of the Caregiver Registration flow on the AT/AD platform. Covers personal & contact information form, inline validation, OTP verification for mobile and email, consent & communication preferences, registration completion, feature parity with PwD, dark mode, static content, and edge cases including duplicate accounts, OTP failures, and session expiry. Linked bug SCRUM-752 (Email OTP input field disappears after Resend OTP) may impact OTP test execution.

inScope: Personal & contact information form (First Name, Last Name, Mobile, Email, Password, Aadhaar, Pincode)
Inline validation for all mandatory fields
Aadhaar privacy and usage information display
OTP expiry, retry limits, resend with cooldown
Post-registration redirect to PwD registration flow
Feature parity with PwD (catalog, product details, recommendations, interest, notifications)
Terms & conditions and Privacy policy links
Static cards (Privacy and Security, To complete registration)
Edge cases: duplicate mobile/email, Aadhaar conflicts, OTP failures, session expiry
outOfScope: PwD registration flow details (covered in SCRUM-281/SCRUM-372)
Backend API internals and encryption protocols

testCases.title: Verify all mandatory fields are displayed on caregiver registration form
testCases.preconditions: User has selected Caregiver account type from sign-up page; Registration form is loaded
steps: 2. Verify First Name field is displayed with label
3. Verify Last Name field is displayed with label
4. Verify Mobile Number field is displayed with +91 country code
5. Verify Email ID field is displayed with label
6. Verify Password field is displayed (masked input)
7. Verify Confirm Password field is displayed (masked input)
8. Verify Aadhaar Number field is displayed (masked input)
9. Verify Pincode field is displayed with label
10. Verify all fields are marked as mandatory (asterisk or required indicator)
11. Verify Aadhaar privacy and usage information text is clearly displayed
expectedResults: All mandatory fields are visible: First Name, Last Name, Mobile Number, Email ID, Password, Confirm Password, Aadhaar Number, Pincode
Mobile Number field shows +91 country code prefix
Password and Confirm Password fields mask input characters
Aadhaar Number field masks input characters
All fields have clear labels and mandatory indicators
Aadhaar privacy/usage information is displayed near the Aadhaar field
testCases.postconditions: Registration form is displayed with all mandatory fields visible

testCases.title: Verify successful caregiver registration with all valid mandatory fields
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page; All OTP services are functional
steps: 1. Enter valid First Name (alphabetic characters only)
2. Enter valid Last Name (alphabetic characters only)
7. Enter valid Password meeting strength requirements
15. Verify user is redirected to PwD registration flow
expectedResults: All fields accept valid input without errors
Mobile and email OTP verification completes successfully
Complete Registration button becomes enabled after all validations pass
Confirmation message indicates successful account creation
User is redirected to PwD registration flow
Caregiver account is created in the system
testCases.postconditions: Caregiver account is created; User is on PwD registration page

testCases.title: Verify registration is blocked when mandatory fields are empty
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page
steps: 3. Verify button is disabled or form submission is blocked
4. Fill only First Name, leave rest empty, attempt submit
5. Verify inline validation errors appear for empty mandatory fields
6. Fill all fields except Aadhaar, attempt submit
7. Verify Aadhaar field shows required error
8. Fill all fields except Pincode, attempt submit
9. Verify Pincode field shows required error
expectedResults: Complete Registration button is disabled when mandatory fields are empty
Inline validation errors appear for each empty mandatory field
Error messages are clear and specific (e.g., 'First Name is required')
Registration cannot proceed with any mandatory field missing
No partial registration occurs
testCases.postconditions: Form remains on registration page with validation errors displayed

testCases.title: Verify inline validation for First Name and Last Name (alphabetic only)
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page
steps: 1. Enter numeric characters in First Name field: '12345'
2. Verify inline validation error for non-alphabetic input
3. Enter special characters in First Name: '@#$%'
9. Repeat steps 1-8 for Last Name field
11. Verify if spaces are accepted in name fields
expectedResults: Numeric characters trigger validation error: 'Only alphabetic characters allowed'
Special characters trigger validation error
Alphanumeric mix triggers validation error
Valid alphabetic names are accepted without error
Inline validation appears immediately on invalid input (not just on submit)
testCases.postconditions: Name field validation is verified

testCases.title: Verify Mobile Number field accepts only 10 digits with +91 country code
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page
steps: 1. Verify +91 country code is displayed as prefix
3. Verify validation error for insufficient digits
5. Verify field restricts to 10 digits or shows error
9. Verify number is accepted without error
10. Verify Send OTP button becomes available
expectedResults: +91 country code is displayed and non-editable
Less than 10 digits triggers validation error
More than 10 digits is either blocked or triggers error
Non-numeric characters are rejected
Valid 10-digit number is accepted
Send OTP button is enabled after valid number entry
testCases.postconditions: Mobile number validation is verified

testCases.title: Verify Email ID format validation
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page
steps: 2. Verify inline validation error for invalid format
10. Verify email is accepted without error
11. Verify Send OTP button becomes available for email
expectedResults: Invalid email formats trigger inline validation error
Error message: 'Please enter a valid email address'
Valid email format is accepted without error
Send OTP button is enabled after valid email entry
testCases.postconditions: Email validation is verified

testCases.title: Verify Password and Confirm Password validation
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page
steps: 2. Verify password strength indicator or validation error
11. Verify passwords match and no error shown
expectedResults: Weak passwords trigger validation error or strength warning
Password field masks all characters
Confirm Password mismatch shows error: 'Passwords do not match'
Matching strong passwords are accepted without error
Password requirements are displayed to user
testCases.postconditions: Password validation is verified

testCases.title: Verify Aadhaar Number field accepts only 12 digits with masked input
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page
steps: 2. Verify Aadhaar privacy and usage information is displayed
4. Verify validation error for insufficient digits
6. Verify field restricts to 12 digits or shows error
11. Verify Aadhaar is accepted without error
expectedResults: Aadhaar privacy/usage information is clearly visible
Less than 12 digits triggers validation error
More than 12 digits is blocked or triggers error
Non-numeric characters are rejected
Valid 12-digit Aadhaar is accepted
Aadhaar input is masked for privacy
testCases.postconditions: Aadhaar validation and masking verified

testCases.title: Verify Pincode field accepts only valid 6-digit input
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page
steps: 2. Verify validation error for insufficient digits
4. Verify field restricts to 6 digits or shows error
8. Verify validation error for invalid pincode
10. Verify pincode is accepted without error
expectedResults: Less than 6 digits triggers validation error
More than 6 digits is blocked or triggers error
Non-numeric characters are rejected
Invalid pincode triggers validation error
Valid 6-digit pincode is accepted without error
testCases.postconditions: Pincode validation is verified

testCases.title: Verify Mobile OTP verification flow (send, enter, verify)
testCases.preconditions: User has entered valid 10-digit mobile number on registration form
steps: 3. Verify OTP is sent (success message displayed)
7. Verify success message: 'Mobile number verified successfully'
8. Verify mobile field shows verified status (checkmark or green indicator)
9. Verify mobile number field becomes read-only after verification
expectedResults: Send OTP button triggers OTP delivery to mobile
Success message confirms OTP sent
OTP input field is displayed
Correct OTP entry results in successful verification
Verified status indicator is shown
Mobile field becomes non-editable after verification
testCases.postconditions: Mobile number is verified; Verification status is stored

testCases.title: Verify Email OTP verification flow (send, enter, verify)
testCases.preconditions: User has entered valid email on registration form
steps: 3. Verify OTP is sent (success message displayed)
8. Verify email field shows verified status (checkmark or green indicator)
9. Verify email field becomes read-only after verification
expectedResults: Send OTP button triggers OTP delivery to email
Success message confirms OTP sent
OTP input field is displayed
Correct OTP entry results in successful verification
Verified status indicator is shown
Email field becomes non-editable after verification
testCases.postconditions: Email is verified; Verification status is stored

testCases.title: Verify incorrect OTP entry shows retry error message
testCases.preconditions: OTP has been sent to mobile or email; OTP input field is visible
steps: 7. Verify error message and remaining retry count (if shown)
expectedResults: Incorrect OTP triggers error message: 'Invalid OTP. Please try again'
Retry is allowed with clear indication
Retry count or remaining attempts may be shown
Correct OTP after failed attempts still verifies successfully
testCases.postconditions: OTP retry error handling is verified

testCases.title: Verify OTP expiry and resend with cooldown
testCases.preconditions: OTP has been sent to mobile or email
steps: 2. Wait for OTP to expire (observe expiry timer if displayed)
5. Verify error message indicating OTP has expired
7. Verify Resend OTP has a cooldown timer
10. Verify new OTP is sent successfully
11. Enter new OTP and verify successfully
expectedResults: Expired OTP triggers error: 'OTP has expired. Please resend'
Resend OTP option is available after expiry
Resend OTP has cooldown timer preventing immediate resend
New OTP is sent after cooldown completes
New OTP verifies successfully
testCases.postconditions: OTP expiry and resend flow is verified

testCases.title: Verify excessive OTP failures trigger temporary verification lock
testCases.preconditions: OTP has been sent to mobile or email
steps: 2. Enter incorrect OTP and click Verify (repeat until max retries exceeded)
3. Verify temporary lock message is displayed
4. Verify OTP input and Verify button are disabled
5. Verify lock duration is communicated to user
6. Wait for lock period to expire
expectedResults: After maximum retry attempts, temporary lock is triggered
Lock message clearly states duration and reason
OTP input is disabled during lock period
After lock period, verification is re-enabled
testCases.postconditions: Temporary verification lock behavior is verified

testCases.title: Verify consent checkbox is mandatory for registration completion
testCases.preconditions: User has filled all mandatory fields and completed OTP verification
steps: 1. Complete all mandatory fields with valid data
2. Complete mobile and email OTP verification
3. Do NOT check the consent checkbox
6. Verify consent text states purpose of communication
7. Verify consent text mentions ability to withdraw consent from profile settings
expectedResults: Complete Registration button is disabled without consent
Consent text clearly states purpose of communication
Consent text mentions ability to withdraw consent later from profile settings
Checking consent enables the Complete Registration button
Unchecking consent disables the button again
Registration is blocked without explicit consent
testCases.postconditions: Consent checkbox mandatory behavior is verified

testCases.title: Verify Complete Registration button enablement logic
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page
steps: 1. Verify Complete Registration button is disabled initially
2. Fill all mandatory fields with valid data
3. Verify button is still disabled (OTPs not verified)
5. Verify button is still disabled (email OTP not verified)
7. Verify button is still disabled (consent not provided)
9. Verify Complete Registration button is now enabled
10. Click the button and verify registration proceeds
expectedResults: Button is disabled when: fields invalid, OTPs not verified, or consent not given
Button is enabled ONLY when ALL three conditions are met: valid fields + both OTPs verified + consent checked
Clicking enabled button proceeds with registration
testCases.postconditions: Button enablement logic is verified for all prerequisite conditions

testCases.title: Verify post-registration redirect to PwD registration flow
testCases.preconditions: User has completed all registration steps and clicked Complete Registration
steps: 1. Complete full registration flow (fields, OTPs, consent)
3. Verify confirmation message is displayed indicating successful account creation
4. Verify user is automatically redirected to PwD registration flow
5. Verify the PwD registration page loads correctly
6. Verify caregiver session is active on the redirected page
expectedResults: Confirmation message: 'Registration successful' or similar
User is redirected to PwD registration flow
PwD registration page loads without errors
Caregiver session is active and authenticated
testCases.postconditions: Caregiver is registered and on PwD registration page

testCases.title: Verify duplicate mobile number shows 'Account exists' with sign-in option
testCases.preconditions: A caregiver account already exists with mobile number '9876543210'
steps: 3. Attempt to send OTP or proceed
7. Verify user is redirected to caregiver sign-in page
expectedResults: Duplicate mobile number triggers 'Account already exists' message
Sign-in option is provided alongside the error
Clicking sign-in redirects to caregiver sign-in page
Registration is blocked for duplicate mobile
testCases.postconditions: Duplicate mobile detection is verified

testCases.title: Verify duplicate email shows 'Account exists' with sign-in option
testCases.preconditions: A caregiver account already exists with email 'existing@example.com'
steps: 3. Attempt to send OTP or proceed
7. Verify user is redirected to caregiver sign-in page
expectedResults: Duplicate email triggers 'Account already exists' message
Sign-in option is provided alongside the error
Clicking sign-in redirects to caregiver sign-in page
Registration is blocked for duplicate email
testCases.postconditions: Duplicate email detection is verified

testCases.title: Verify partial form submission retains data on validation error
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page with some fields filled
steps: 1. Fill First Name, Last Name, and Mobile Number with valid data
3. Attempt to proceed or trigger validation
4. Verify validation error appears for email
5. Verify First Name, Last Name, and Mobile Number data is retained
6. Correct the email to valid format
7. Verify all previously entered data is still present
expectedResults: Validation error appears for invalid field
All previously entered valid data is retained
User does not need to re-enter valid fields after fixing errors
Form state is preserved on validation failure
testCases.postconditions: Data retention on partial submission is verified

testCases.title: Verify 'Back to sign in' navigation works at any point during registration
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page
steps: 3. Click 'Back to sign in' before filling any fields
4. Verify user is redirected to sign-in page
6. Fill some fields with valid data
8. Verify user is redirected to sign-in page
9. Navigate back to registration and verify form is reset
expectedResults: 'Back to sign in' link is visible at all times during registration
Clicking it redirects to sign-in page from any point in the flow
No errors occur during navigation
Returning to registration shows a fresh/reset form
testCases.postconditions: Back to sign in navigation is verified

testCases.title: Verify Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy links redirect correctly
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page
steps: 1. Locate 'Terms & Conditions' link on registration page
3. Verify it opens the Terms & Conditions page
4. Verify the page content loads correctly
8. Verify it opens the Privacy Policy page
9. Verify the page content loads correctly
11. Verify registration form data is retained after returning
expectedResults: Terms & Conditions link is visible and clickable
Clicking opens the correct Terms & Conditions page
Privacy Policy link is visible and clickable
Clicking opens the correct Privacy Policy page
Both pages load with proper content
Registration form data is retained when navigating back
testCases.postconditions: Legal links are verified to redirect correctly

testCases.title: Verify static cards (Privacy and Security, To complete registration) match design
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page
steps: 3. Verify card content matches design specification
7. Verify both cards are readable and properly formatted
expectedResults: 'Privacy and Security' static card is visible and matches design
'To complete registration' text/card is visible and matches design
Layout, typography, and spacing are consistent with design
Cards are properly positioned and do not overlap form elements
testCases.postconditions: Static card content is verified against design

testCases.title: Verify registration page works correctly in Dark Mode
testCases.preconditions: User is on caregiver registration page; Dark mode toggle is available
steps: 1. Navigate to caregiver registration page in light mode
3. Verify all form fields are visible and readable in dark mode
4. Verify labels and placeholder text have proper contrast
5. Verify validation error messages are visible in dark mode
6. Verify OTP input fields render correctly in dark mode
7. Verify consent checkbox and text are visible
8. Verify buttons (Send OTP, Complete Registration) are visible
9. Verify static cards render correctly in dark mode
10. Complete a full registration flow in dark mode
expectedResults: All form elements are visible with proper contrast in dark mode
Text is readable against dark background
Validation errors are visible and distinguishable
OTP fields and buttons render correctly
Static cards display properly in dark mode
Full registration flow works without visual issues in dark mode
testCases.postconditions: Dark mode rendering is verified for registration page

AC_A_personal_contact_info.description: Caregiver must provide mandatory details with inline validation

AC_B_otp_verification.description: OTP verification for mobile and email with expiry, retry, and resend

AC_C_consent_communication.description: Mandatory consent checkbox with clear text about purpose and withdrawal

AC_D_registration_completion.description: Complete Registration button enablement, redirect to PwD flow, confirmation

AC_E_feature_parity.description: Caregiver access to PwD-equivalent features (requires OTP/account infrastructure)

AC_F_general.description: Back to sign in, T&C/Privacy links, static cards, dark mode

EC_validation_identity.description: Duplicate mobile/email, invalid pincode, partial submission

EC_otp_verification.description: Incorrect OTP, expired OTP, excessive failures, network failure

EC_registration_access.description: Duplicate submission, session expiry (requires OTP/account infrastructure)

assumptions: Caregiver registration page is accessible from account type selection (SCRUM-354)
OTP services (mobile and email) are functional in QA environment
Aadhaar validation service is available in QA
Dark mode toggle is available on the registration page
Design specifications for static cards are finalized
Feature parity features (catalog, recommendations) are deployed in QA
dependencies: SCRUM-354: Account type selection must route to caregiver registration
SCRUM-281/SCRUM-372: PwD registration flow must be available for post-registration redirect
SCRUM-360: Caregiver sign-in page must be available for 'Back to sign in' and duplicate account flows
OTP delivery infrastructure must be operational
SCRUM-752 (Bug): Email OTP input field disappears after Resend OTP - may impact TC_CG_REG_013

open_questions_and_clarifications.question: What are the exact password strength requirements (min length, required character types)?
What is the OTP expiry duration and maximum retry count?
open_questions_and_clarifications.impact: Affects TC_CG_REG_013 and TC_CG_REG_014 timing and retry counts

open_questions_and_clarifications.question: Is the Aadhaar field optional or mandatory? Story says mandatory but AC mentions 'unless mandated by policy'
open_questions_and_clarifications.impact: Affects TC_CG_REG_008 and TC_CG_REG_003 mandatory field validation

open_questions_and_clarifications.question: What is the cooldown duration for Resend OTP?
Does the consent checkbox include WhatsApp communication preference?
open_questions_and_clarifications.impact: Edge case mentions 'WhatsApp selected without verified mobile' but AC doesn't detail WhatsApp option

open_questions_and_clarifications.question: SCRUM-752 bug: Email OTP input field disappears after Resend OTP - is this resolved?
open_questions_and_clarifications.impact: Directly impacts TC_CG_REG_013 email OTP resend testing

priority_order: Highest tests (TC_CG_REG_001, 002, 003, 010, 011, 015) should be executed first - core registration flow
High priority tests (004-008, 012, 013, 016-019, 022) cover field validation, OTP edge cases, and navigation
Medium priority tests (009, 014, 020, 021, 023-027) cover pincode, Aadhaar conflicts, static content, feature parity
Low priority tests (028, 029) cover session expiry and accessibility

estimated_effort.critical_path: 8-10 hours for critical path testing only

test_environment_requirements: QA environment with AT/AD platform accessible
OTP delivery service (mobile and email) functional
Pre-registered caregiver accounts for duplicate tests
Browser developer tools for session verification
known_issues: SCRUM-752: Email OTP input field disappears after clicking Resend OTP - may block TC_CG_REG_013

metadata.coverage: 100% of acceptance criteria (A-F) and edge cases covered
